title: QuickCommands
description: A minecraft mod with GUIs for easy access to useful commands.
body:
# QuickCommands A fabricmc minecraft mod with GUIs for easy access to useful commands. Using this mod, you are able to execute **/time**, **/weather**, **/effect** and player scaling commands easily, all from a simple GUI. ### Current Features (v1.2): - Set the time - Set the weather - Give yourself some effects - Manage your player's scale ### Languages: - English - German - German (Austrian) - [Up to 1.21.4] Russian - [Up to 1.21.4] Ukrainian ### Special Thanks: - [ludwici](https://github.com/ludwici) for translating the mod into Russian and Ukranian ### Also available on: - [Curseforge](https://curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/quickcommands)

This project is licensed under the **GNU Affero General Public License v3.0**. See the [LICENSE](https://github.com/MarioS271/quick_commands_mod/blob/main/LICENSE) file for details.
